items.label: Mask: silicone soft and intact, strap not perished, lens not deeply scratched
items.hint: Dry suction test — place mask on face without strap, inhale through the nose; it should stay in place

items.label: BCD: inflate fully on the surface, pressure should hold ~30 seconds without audible hiss
BCD: inflator inflate / deflate buttons not sticky, every dump valve pulls open and reseals
Regulator first stage: no green corrosion, no salt crust, hoses without cracks, bulges, or abrasion
Regulator: both second stages breathe smoothly — no wet breath, no free-flow, mouthpiece not torn
items.hint: Pressurize the tank, breathe each second-stage on the surface, press the purge briefly

items.label: SPG: needle moves smoothly, returns to ~0 with valve closed, reads tank pressure with valve open
Tank: current visual inspection mark, no deep dents or heavy corrosion, valve turns smoothly
items.hint: Inspection stamp is usually on the tank neck or shoulder

items.label: Exposure suit: no large tears, zippers run smoothly, seals intact, neoprene flexible (not stiff or perished)
Weights: belt buckle not corroded, integrated pockets release cleanly, total weight matches plan
Dive computer: battery indicator OK, screen readable in daylight, buttons respond
